description: Create a two-column content slide on World Security with survey prompt text on the left and a horizontal bar chart on the right comparing likely vs unlikely responses, plus a 2023 comparison column.

header.headline: World Security
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

labels: Nuclear weapons will be used in a conflict somewhere in the world
There will be a new global pandemic caused by a new virus
A rogue artificial intelligence program that can't be shut down will cause significant havoc in [COUNTRY]
The war in Ukraine will end in 2025
The conflicts in the Middle East will end in 2025
An asteroid will hit the Earth
right.title: Global averages

footer.source: © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report. Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
